entry.title: Re: procedure to pull a report with All the SAP Addons of...
entry.content: Thanks Leo

entry.title: Re: procedure to pull a report with All the SAP Addons of...
entry.content: Is there a specific way to find only Add Ons installed on managed system from Solman?

entry.title: Re: Sending ASN from Freight Order (embedded TM)
entry.content:
Hello thomaspasberg,

thanks a lot for your response. We don't use ASR. We don't see any advantage using this scenario.

My understanding is that we have to substitute the current shipment (LE-TRA) where we send the DESADV with a freight order in SAP-TM (embedded) sending the ASN-message. Furthermore, it should be possible to send it from a freight order and the consignment order is NOT mandatory. Please correct me, if I should be wrong.

We try to set-up the message with:

Is this correct?

Unfortunately, there is no "how-to" and/or specific guideline how to set-up the ASN. This would be very helpful for customers moving from LE-TRA to SAP-TM.

Regards,
Thorsten

entry.title: Approach to identify and remove duplicates from SAP ECC & CRM applications
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to know if there is any tool or methodology which could identify and cleanup duplicate data in CRM and ERP application such as contacts, and customers. We have a client which is currently on SAP stack and want to accelerate the data cleanup process from CRM and ERP applications. If you have developed any programs, tools, or processes which can be used then we would love to leverage those instead of manual workaround.

Regards,

Deepak Rastogi

entry.title: Re: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology
entry.content:
Hi @JuWi 

We received your request and are in the process of evaluating the problem.
Please allow for a delay in our response.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Need clarification on systems for Snote implementation & Managed System configuration.
entry.content:
Hello SAP,
We have below concerns/queries:
1) Is Security S-notes implementation required in (SAP Cloud Connector) and (SAP Convergent Mediation) systems? If yes, please let us know how to implement S-notes.
2) Is it possible to do "Managed Systems Configuration" for these 2 systems in production solman system?
Could you please clarify on these two concerns/queries.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need clarification on systems for Snote implementatio...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding your concerns, 
1. Security notes implementations are required in various SAP systems, so it should be the same for your systems. 
Please refer to How to Implement SAP note in SNOTE - SAP Community for implementing SAP note in SNOTE. Should you have other concerns regarding note implementation, please contact component BC-UPG-NA for further support.
2. It is possible to do managed system configuration for these systems in solution manager.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementat...
entry.content: 🙂

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report / PrintOutputController.ModifyPrinterN...
entry.content:
Hello Gottfried,

we experience this problem with different printer manufacturers (e.g. Sharp, UTAX and Kyocera also). Sharp told us to use an universal driver. 😠
We found that this problem only occurs when printing to a problematic printer that is not the default printer. It is not a solution, but perhaps a viable workaround, to make it the default printer.

Regards
HML

entry.title: Re: What to start from to gain knowledge in FPSL?
entry.content:
Hi @LikhachevE 
This was a misunderstanding 
Currently there are no live sessions planned for this topic.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide

thanks for your question and I hope all is well with you! Stock Transport Orders (Release Orders for Stock Transfer Orders) should be visible:

entry.title: Re: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Dear cloud_delict and m_sarosh,

Pls. check if you have properly configured your Universal ID. Pls. follow this guide to configure it:
https://learninghub.sap.com/help-center/faq/SAPuid 

If you still do not receive a notification to claim your new digital badge pls. create a ticket:
https://support.learning.sap.com/#/create-new-ticket

Best regards, Dieter

entry.title: 1H2024 REST API reviewRouteMaps for Performance Management
entry.content:
I have a question regarding the use of the API in conjunction with the activated manager transfer for forms that are being processed.

Can the API also be used to remove a user ID from a single-step, EMM role in a form so that the step is omitted?
Is the change always retained statically in the form?
Or is this change corrected again by the active manager transfer when a manager change is made, thereby adding the step again?

Many thanks for your feedback

entry.title: Re: GUI_DOWNLOAD unknown_dp_error
entry.content:
REPORT csv.

* Reading data from Microsoft CSV *


PARAMETERS: p_fname    TYPE string OBLIGATORY,
            tb_name    TYPE tabname16 OBLIGATORY,
            date_f(10) TYPE c MODIF ID abc DEFAULT 'MM/DD/YYYY', "date format
            deli(1)    TYPE c MODIF ID abc DEFAULT ';', "delimiter
            dec_f      TYPE string MODIF ID abc DEFAULT '1,234,567.89', "decimal format
            w_h_line   AS CHECKBOX MODIF ID abc DEFAULT 'X'. "with_header_line

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT SCREEN.
    IF screen-group1 = 'ABC'.
      screen-input = 0.
    ENDIF.
    MODIFY SCREEN.
  ENDLOOP.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR p_fname.
  PERFORM file_open_dialog CHANGING p_fname.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  DATA: lf_line TYPE string.

  DATA: lt_config       TYPE mmpur_mgrp2pgrp_t,
        gt_itab         TYPE truxs_t_text_data,
        ls_file_line    LIKE LINE OF  gt_itab,
        lv_filename     TYPE string,
        lv_filename_usr TYPE localfile,
        l_table_count   TYPE i,
        data_ref        TYPE REF TO data.


  DATA : d_entry        TYPE REF TO data.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
    <t_entry> TYPE table,
    <line>    TYPE any.

  CREATE DATA d_entry TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF (tb_name).
  ASSIGN  d_entry->* TO <t_entry>.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS:
  <line2> TYPE any .

  CREATE DATA data_ref TYPE (tb_name).
  ASSIGN data_ref->* TO <line2>.

  DATA:tb_data     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF str_table,
       gt_split    TYPE TABLE OF string,
       gt_variable TYPE TABLE OF string,
       tb_header   TYPE TABLE OF string,
       it_data     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  data_ref,
       count       TYPE i,
       index       TYPE i VALUE 1,
       header      TYPE string,
       value       TYPE string.

  DATA : variable     TYPE string,
         in_month     TYPE string,
         in_day       TYPE string,
         out_month(2),
         out_day(2).

  DATA : variable_tmp   LIKE variable,
         TYPE_of_value  LIKE dd01v-datatype,
         is_decimal(1)  TYPE c,
         is_negative(1) TYPE c.


  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_fname
      filetype                = 'ASC'
      has_field_separator     = deli
      read_by_line            = 'X'
    TABLES
      data_tab                = gt_itab
    EXCEPTIONS
      file_open_error         = 1
      file_read_error         = 2
      no_batch                = 3
      gui_refuse_filetransfer = 4
      invalid_type            = 5
      no_authority            = 6
      unknown_error           = 7
      bad_data_format         = 8
      header_not_allowed      = 9
      separator_not_allowed   = 10
      header_too_long         = 11
      unknown_dp_error        = 12
      access_denied           = 13
      dp_out_of_memory        = 14
      disk_full               = 15
      dp_timeout              = 16
      OTHERS                  = 17.
  IF sy-subrc NE 0.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  IF lines( gt_itab ) = 0 .
    WRITE / ` Excel file is empty!`.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.




  LOOP AT gt_itab INTO ls_file_line.

    lf_line  = ls_file_line.

*   split record into fields
    IF sy-tabix = 1.
      SPLIT ls_file_line AT deli INTO TABLE tb_header.
      DESCRIBE TABLE  tb_header LINES count.
    ELSE.

      "SPLIT ls_file_line AT deli INTO TABLE gt_split.
      CALL FUNCTION 'RSDS_CONVERT_CSV'
        EXPORTING
          i_data_sep       = deli
          i_esc_char       = '"'
          i_record         = lf_line
          i_field_count    = 9999
        IMPORTING
          e_t_data         = gt_split
        EXCEPTIONS
          escape_no_close  = 1
          escape_improper  = 2
          conversion_error = 3
          OTHERS           = 4.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        MESSAGE 'Error importing file' TYPE 'E'.
      ENDIF.

      index = 1.
      WHILE index <= count.
        READ TABLE gt_split INDEX index TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          header = tb_header[ index ].
          CONDENSE header.
          value  = gt_split[ index ].
          CONDENSE value.
          IF value IS NOT INITIAL.
            TRY.

                variable = CONV string( value ).

                " check date format MM/DD/YYYY and conv it
                FIND REGEX '^\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4}$' IN variable .
                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  SPLIT variable AT '/' INTO TABLE gt_variable.
                  in_day   = gt_variable[ 1 ].
                  in_month = gt_variable[ 2 ].
                  out_month =  |{ in_month ALPHA = IN }|.
                  out_day =  |{ in_day ALPHA = IN }|.
                  DATA(date_formated) = |{ gt_variable[ 3 ] }|  & |{  out_day }|  & |{  out_month }|.
                  value = CONV date( date_formated ).
                ENDIF.
                " check date format MM/DD/YYYY and conv it

                "check value if is number
                CLEAR : variable_tmp , TYPE_of_value , is_decimal.

                variable_tmp =  variable .
                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN variable_tmp WITH space.
                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '.' IN variable_tmp WITH space.

                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  is_decimal = 'X'.
                ENDIF.

                REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '-' IN variable_tmp WITH space.

                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  is_negative = 'X'.
                ENDIF.

                CALL FUNCTION 'NUMERIC_CHECK'
                  EXPORTING
                    string_in  = variable_tmp
                  IMPORTING
                    string_out = variable_tmp
                    htype      = TYPE_of_value.

                IF TYPE_of_value = 'NUMC'.
                  IF is_decimal = 'X'.

                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN value WITH space.
                    IF is_negative <> 'X'.
                      REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING '.' IN value WITH ','.
                    ENDIF.
                  ELSE.
                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF SUBSTRING ',' IN value WITH space.
                  ENDIF.
                ENDIF.
                "check value if is number

                <line2>-(header) = value.

                IF <line2>-(header) <> value.
                  WRITE / ` ERROR : line` && ` => ` && index && ` column` && ` => ` && header.
                  WRITE / ` Error during registration of characteristic ` && value && ` to data element `  &&  <line2>-(header) .
                  RETURN.
                ENDIF.
              CATCH cx_root.
                WRITE / ` ERROR : line` && ` => ` && index && ` column` && ` => ` && header.
                WRITE / ` ERROR : Incompatible data element`.
                RETURN.
            ENDTRY.
          ENDIF.

        ENDIF.
        index = index + 1.
      ENDWHILE.

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <t_entry> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<line1>).
      <line1>  =  CORRESPONDING #( <line2>  ).
      CLEAR : <line2>.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT <t_entry> ASSIGNING <line>.
    INSERT (tb_name) FROM <line>.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      l_table_count = l_table_count + 1 .
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  COMMIT WORK AND WAIT.

  WRITE / ' Query OK, ' && l_table_count && ' rows affected' .


FORM file_open_dialog CHANGING cp_fname.

  DATA: lt_filetable TYPE filetable,
        lv_rc        TYPE i.

  cl_gui_frontend_services=>file_open_dialog(
    EXPORTING
      default_extension       = 'csv'
      file_filter             = '(*.csv)|*.csv|'
      multiselection          =  abap_false
    CHANGING
      file_table              = lt_filetable
      rc                      = lv_rc
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS                  = 1 ).

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
  ENDIF.

  TRY.
      cp_fname = lt_filetable[ 1 ]-filename.
    CATCH cx_root.
  ENDTRY.

ENDFORM.
"Reading data from Microsoft CSV *

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm SEBRI HOUSSEM, an industrial engineering graduate. Currently, I'm diving into the world of SAP for PP and QM modules. I'm actively seeking opportunities to enhance my digital skills to keep up with all the innovations in the SAP ecosystem. Passionate about learning and development, I firmly believe SAP offers a variety of learning paths and certifications to further my professional growth. I'm eager to be part of this initiative and make an impact on learning for many organizations.

entry.title: Re: Tile Personnalization
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Somebody knows how can i personalize the content of this tile "Change status Network Activity" in Fiori, plz?

There's the content !

Thanks !

 SAP Fiori SAP Community UI SAP GUI for Windows SAP Fiori Client SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to transform a date into calendar week in SAC within the model data in wrangling
entry.content:
Hello SAC-Community,

I am thinking of how to be able to join two import data sources into one SAC model. One of the join criterias would be the calendar week.

So I would import the data with dates from the first data source (SQL database) and then add data from a BW on HANA, where I already have a field with calendar week and year.

Therefore I would have to tranform the date from the imported SQL-data into the calendar week. But how can I achieve this? I did not find a function for this in the SAC wrangling environment. Has there anybody an idea?

(...and the calendar week that is in the date dimension for filtering does not seem to be available for joining two data sources in the data warangling environment)

Thanks a lot and best regards,
Martin

entry.title: SAP Business One Web Client Order-to-Cash Pre-sales - Demo _ 2024 Partner Summit
entry.content:
Step-by-step Video: OrderToCash2402_V1.mp4

Summarised Highlights for Marketing Documents:

Until 2402:

•Long Text  (opening and Closing Text)
•Support “Text” and “Subtotal” line types
•Linked list Views


Outlook to 2405:
- Sales Quotation; Alternative Items
- Marketing Documents: Rich Text editor (opening and Closing Text)
- Marketing Documents: Reference documents 
- Marketing Documents: Copy to/from

More SAP Business One Web Client Product Updates: 

 

https://help.sap.com/doc/1e149715909a4d8ea8920df5513eb64c/10.0/en-US/SAP_Business_One_10.0_Highlights.pdf

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
Hello, 
In which release are you looking for the data source?
Please note that the feature is only available as of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 and is not yet available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
Best regards
Angelika

entry.title: Navigating the Energy Transition: Transforming the S.MART Shop from an Energy Consumer to Prosumer.
entry.content:
Navigating the Energy Transition: From Energy Consumer to Prosumer at SAP Experience Centre in Walldorf.

In the heart of SAP Walldorf Campus, where innovation thrives and technology sets the stage for the future, there's a place where cutting-edge technology meets the pressing challenges of our time—the SAP Experience Centre. Here, with the S.MART Energy Shop showcase, customers and partners embark in firsthand on a transformation journey that navigates the intersection of Distributed Energy Resources (DERs), the rise of the prosumer, and the power of digital innovation.

In this blog post, you will know more about the project to transform the S.MART Shop in the SAP Walldorf Experience Centre from an Energy Consumer to an Energy Prosumer.

 

Embracing the Distributed Energy Future

The energy landscape is undergoing a profound transformation, driven by the proliferation of DERs—solar panels, wind turbines, battery storage, and electric vehicles. This transformation process has a major impact reshaping how we generate, distribute, and consume electricity. Also is affecting the Utilities business model: affect how they manage the assets, how the utilities interact with customers and what customers expect from the utilities.

At the SAP Experience Centre, visitors delve into the world of DERs, discovering how these assets are empowering individuals, businesses, and communities to take control of their energy destiny into a more decentralized, digitalized, and sustainable energy system.

 

The Rise of the Prosumer

The Energy Transition is a reality. Prosumers are growing in the energy space as more customers generate their own electricity from distributed energy resources. Gone are the days when electricity consumption was a one-way street. Today’s electric grid is blurring the lines between power generation and consumption.

At the S.MART Shop showcase, visitors witness in firsthand how individuals and organizations can apply DERs, smart meters, and digital platforms to become active participants in the energy ecosystem, guided by the experience of their Utilities companies.

 

Navigating the Transformation Journey

Transitioning from a passive energy consumer to an active prosumer comes with challenges. At the showcase, visitors gain insights into the transformation journey, from understanding energy consumption patterns and evaluating DER options to navigating financial considerations. Through expert-led workshops and interactive simulations, visitors discover how SAP and Partner solutions can help simplify the transition process, giving prosumers with the tools and insights they need to succeed in the new energy landscape.

 

 

CONCLUSION: Shaping the Future of Energy Together

The journey from energy consumers to advance prosumers isn't just a vision of the future—it's a reality. At the SAP Experience Centre customers have the chance to explore this transformative journey, from the potential of distributed energy resources to the empowerment of prosumers through digital innovation. Whether you're a utility executive navigating the complexities of the energy transition or a business looking to take control of your energy future, the showcase shares a light into the possibilities that lie ahead. Together, we can shape a more sustainable, resilient, and efficient energy future—one where everyone has the power to become a prosumer and contribute to a brighter tomorrow.

 

If you want to request a tour please visit the SAP Experience Center website or get in contact with your SAP Representative.

entry.title: How to set "CopyToTargetDoc" in Attachments to No when "CopyAttachmentsFromBaseToTarget" equals Yes?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to attach a file to a marketing document but it should not be copied to target documents.

In the UI you can uncheck the checkbox when the setting at company level is checked, but using the value tNO via Service Layer or DI API does not seem to work, neither in attachment creation or in an update operation.

However, when the company setting is set to No, you can set CopyToTargetDoc to Yes as expected.

Here you have a sample payload for Attachments2 endpoint. CopyToTargetDoc is stored as tYES.


{
    "Attachments2_Lines": [
        {
            "FileExtension": "txt",
            "FileName": "Prueba_adjunto",
            "SourcePath": "C:\\Users\\jdelviso\\Desktop",
            "CopyToTargetDoc": "tNO"
        }
    ]
}
 
System info:
 
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.180) FP 2111 (64-bit)

entry.title: Re: Sending ASN from Freight Order (embedded TM)
entry.content:
If ASR is not used, the delivery goods movement status is not propagated to the Freight Order. This status is checked in the standard PPF-action TOR_TPNOR_ASN for sending the ASN. Thus, in your scenario it will not work by just re-using the standard actions.

To send the ASN-message based on your process, you can use a custom PPF-action which is triggered as soon as required. To do so, you can check the PPF-guide Output Management Configuration Guide (sap.com) and the TM-enhancement guide Hands on Guide TMS (sap.com) In your custom-action you can trigger the TORGenericRequest_Out message similar to the standard coding. As a reference, you can check the method call exec_tor_tpnord_fu_asn for Consignment Orders in the SAP standard PPF-class /SCMTMS/CL_PPF_SERV_TOR_B2B and method METHOD_CALL_BY_ABAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarifica...
entry.content:
Hello @Brinda911 ,

Please make sure you check the data flow overview so you see the chronology of objects needed to be created and replicated. Then please go through the set up document and make sure that you have the configurations done correctly in SB, CPI, Event Mesh and S/4HanaCloud systems. I think this should help you to get an overview how the data flows between the systems. Links can be found below.

Data Flow Overview:

https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/integration/data-flow-overview 

Setup:

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/57Z_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf 

Best regards,

Shpresim Shabaj

entry.title: Re: Risk is not appearing in Risk analysis Screen

entry.title: Implement T-code：ABUMN appear message AA318
entry.content:
Hi All,

I use ABUMN to transfer asset in 2024.04, but appear message AA318.

I found the original invoice posting date is in 2024.05, so I reversed the invoice then repost in 2024.04, but the message AA318 still exist.

Via debug, I found the date checking logic in the picture, The data retrieved by method still contains the reversed invoice items.

I guess the data take from table ANEK, the reversed invoice posting date it in 2024.05, According to the logic in the picture, there is any posting date from ANEK greater than the posting date I specified in ABUMN, the message AA318 will appear.

Is there any way for me to transfer assets in 2024.04?

If the expression is not clear, please tell me by replying. Thanks All!

entry.title: Re: Passing Internal Table / Deep Structure in Submit program
entry.content:
This trick is not needed anymore, you can pass any kind of data object (*) if you indicate "NO-DISPLAY".

Example:

 

REPORT.
PARAMETERS itab TYPE string_table NO-DISPLAY.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  IF itab IS INITIAL.
    itab = VALUE #( ( `Hello world` ) ).
    SUBMIT zzsro_pass_any_itab_via_submit WITH itab = itab AND RETURN.
  ELSE.
    WRITE itab[ 1 ].
  ENDIF.

 

(*) To be precise (ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com)😞

"If the addition NO-DISPLAY is specified, a selection parameter can have any data types except for reference types. These selection parameters can only be filled using the WITH addition of the SUBMIT statement. In this case, unlike the general conversion rule for deep types, the same rules apply as when importing data from a data cluster."

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content:
Exporting the following environment variable would display more detailed logs for remote services:

export SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL=silly

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content:
For Cloud Foundry, use the following command to set the environment variable for your application:

cf set-env <your_app> SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL silly

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: \nread ECONNRESET in CAP OData Service
entry.content: kubectl set env deployment <your_deployment_name> SAP_CLOUD_SDK_LOG_LEVEL=silly

entry.title: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement type 309
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am executing a mat to mat movt type 309 for a batch managed material where the batch characteristics values are not getting copied over to the new batch. 

How can this be enabled? Pls share any solution approaches. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Query related learning hub course:'Acquiring Core ABA...
entry.content: Could you explain how the answer below helped? I mean "accepted solution"

entry.title: Performance Process - Suggestions
entry.content:
Hello,

we are currently re-thinking our performance process to make it more easier.

Currently we have the following in place:

1. Performance Objectives from January - December

2. Performance Review in October (inlcuding objectives review)

3. On demand individual performance form (IDP) set up as a regular performance form including development objectives.

We would like to shorten this process so that the performance review is only for the objectives and then have a separate process for development.

How do you manage the development process? We are thinking to have a mid-year performance form for development but probably continous performance would be better.

Let me know your thoughts.

Kind regards,

Simon

entry.title: Issue in custom purchase requisition app after SAPUI5 version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We have recently upgraded the SAPUI5 version to 1.71.64 as suggested by SAP post SP upgrade as we were having issues with few finance Fiori apps.

 

After the upgrade, finance apps errors were resolved. However, now we are facing one issue in custom app where unwanted field is appearing on the screen. If this is not fixed, then business processes will be affected.

 

Can you please let me know if there are any KBAs for any changes to be done in custom apps post SAPUI5 version upgrade.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Krutika Rani

entry.title: SAP MII How insert data to MDO throught illuminator
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying pass arguments to my MDO throught illuminator. I create link like this:
http://<server>:<port>/XMII/Illuminator?server=MDOConnector&Mode=Insert&MDO=Project%2FMIIOBJ%2FMDOTest&Col1=Value1&Col2=Value2.

When I execute this link I recieve message in my browser that "Command Query Successful". After this when I check MDO in workbench I can see that It looks like this:

Why I can't see my values? Do I need to change anything in permissions?

Is there any different option to dynamically push data to MDO?

entry.title: Create / Mass creation and Mass changes to Customer-Material Info record (KNMT table) in MDG Fiori
entry.content: Hi, Is there a way to create, mass create, mass change the Customer-Material Info record (KNMT table) in MDG Fiori App? Can it be configured in such a way in the backend?

entry.title: Re: abap2UI5 - (1) Introduction: Developing UI5 Apps Purely in ABAP
entry.content: @Yogeshwaran abap2UI5 is based on a single JSON Model which is used as a View Model and exchanged between backend and frontend all the time. Defining more Models at the frontend is not possible and makes no sense as it would contradict the concept of abap2UI5. In abap2UI5 all data and models are defined and hold in your abap implementation in the backend, and only infos which are relevant for the view are send to the frontend.

entry.title: Angular
entry.content: What is the use of Angular in SAP Business One ? Where can I get a link for studying it ?

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content:
hi @bernhard_grusie ,

in the below tutorial to Call an external API SAP BTP ABAP Environment and parse the response using JSON or XML there is no usage of service consumption model..could you please let us know in what scenarios SVC is optional.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-external-api.html

Thanks

Kris

entry.title: Show Changeset error response from SAP RAP in UI
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am creating a mass upload Fiori app using SAP RAP in the backend. I would be passing multiple requests as part of batch and then validate those requests in the backend. I am returning error messages for the failed records and I want to highlight the entries which have errors but the problem is in UI, the error response fails with error 400 and I just see one error for whole batch. The error response has the error messages from the backend but there is no way I can link the errors to the requests.

Any pointers will be appreciated.

thanks

entry.title: How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?

 

SELECTION-SCREEN : BEGIN OF SCREEN 247 as SUBSCREEN.
  PARAMETERS :      werks    type ekpo-werks,
                    matnr     type matnr,
                    lgort      type EKPO-LGORT.
  SELECT-OPTIONS : so_data for budat.
SELECTION-SCREEN : END OF SCREEN 247.

 

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE STATUS_0240.
  call SUBSCREEN sub
  INCLUDING sy-repid '0247'.
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  call SUBSCREEN sub.
  MODULE USER_COMMAND_0240.

entry.title: How to Auto fill Planning Columns in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I am working on FTE planning and the Planning is done Month wise . My measure is FTE .

I have been asked to auto fill the FTE coming from HR Master Data for each employee into these forecasted months by default .

Example if employee 1 FTE is 0.5 then copy this value to Forecast from JAN-DEC planning columns.

Please Help .

 

Thanks,

Zeba

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Replication Flow - Started failing w...
entry.content:
Hello,

Apply latest notes from Note Analyzer (program CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI) in your S/4 system.

That fixed the partition error for us.

Best regards

entry.title: Joule free message limits
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if the annual message limits for Joule (for ex. for small clients 240.000 messages) are applicable for all instances together? Or is the limit valid for each instance, so clients could use 240.000 in the test system and additional 240.000 messages in the productive system?

Best regards

Julia

entry.title: SuccessFactors ONB Custom Task JSON Codat sample
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have configured the ONB Custom Task in SAP SUccessFactors Onboarding module. But out customer wants to enable few instructions fields like Message String only if certain field are seleted.

We are trying to write a JSON code to populate if Hiring manager has selected Yes for Is Laptop and Charger then instructions message to be populated Below is the sample JSON Code but it is not working.

{
"type": "Rich Text",
"Condition": {
"scope": "#/properties/x-laptopCharger",
"schema": {
"expectedValue": "Yes"
}
}
}

@Gopinath : Any help

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – 2405
entry.content: Any enhancements or updates to Order Based Planning?

entry.title: Re: "Mobile Services Cockpit - Trial" version warning "Mi...
entry.content: Looking at the screenshot https://community.sap.com/t5/image/serverpage/image-id/105655i704B0F420DA4ABFF/image-size/large?v=v2&px=999, there is currently no application (it shows 0 started, 0 stopped apps) in your space. In general, you would see BindMobileApplicationRoutesToME listed under applications in the space cockpit when creating a BTP trial account. In your case, It didn't happen due to some reasons. I will forward this thread to our experts from mobile services to share what can be done here.

entry.title: Excluding inspection step in Advanced returns management.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can you some one help with possibilities of taking Quality notification/ inspection steps from advanced returns management? We do not have Quality view maintained in Material Master.

Currently, our business does not have quality in-scope and when we create Subsequent free of charge order in returns overview, process status shows as incomplete without inspection steps of (MSR_INSPWH)

 

Thank you
Satwik Joshi

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
@PeterGutsche  - Thanks for reply. 

A workaround to bypass this situation would be to associate the API client with a user defined by an identity provider. - Could you please elaborate more on associating API client with user? 

We are looking to enable feature where Service keys will be used within CI/CD pipeline and expecting that service key associated with particular package (and its owner) will be able to deploy/change iflows and restrictions will be applied via Access Policy etc.

entry.title: Re: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement type 309
entry.content: I have already made the required settings for movement type 309 by selecting 4 in batch classification and copy chars as Characteristics from classification (priority) and configuration

entry.title: Need to configure reverse pricing
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario in which I enter amount in PR00 inclusive of tax for ex if the price is Rs100 and tax is 18%  then my total value will be Rs100 + Rs18(18% of 100) = Rs118, I will enter Rs118 in PR00. I want to get Rs100 in net value and Rs18 in total tax calculation.

I have tried a copying pricing procedure RVAB01, and tried to insert JOIG condition within it, but the JOIG is calculating the wrong tax value. It is calculating Rs19.62 in JOIG. It is calculating correct value in MWSI which is Rs18.

Please suggest me how to implement the scenario on priority.

entry.title: Re: Batch Characteristics value transfer for movement typ...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked the settings under   “Activate Batch Classification for Goods Movements in IM” – OMCV, whether the batch classification is maintained for the movement type 309?. If not you can set the classification option to 4 in a test system and recheck. You can research more on other options available.

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need change the font size in input control member selection.

I try to CSS for this case. It works for Header Title and Subtitle but not work in selection. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: How to remove spacing and underline between label and value at selection-screen of subscreen?
entry.content: You can customize it a little bit only by using SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN/END OF LINE, although I don't see a good reason to just "remove spacing and underline".

entry.title: Re: How to complete Physical inventory doc if I not do MI07
entry.content:
Hi 

Go to MI02 and put deletion for indicator . It will be closed 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementat...
entry.content:
Hi @JuWi,

Thank you for raising this question!

In the learning journey you screenshot, these elemtents are not arranged as dedicated chapters. If you want to go deeper into these areas, I can recommend you to visit the following learning journey:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-agile-project-delivery

Thank you,

Omar

entry.content:

Developer Extensibility.

Getting Started as a Developer in the ABAP Environment.

entry.title: Pricing Discount with scales
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I need to apply a discount with different percentages on one sales order.

In detail if I have two items I have to apply a discount of 20% while if the sales order contain more than two items I have to apply the discount percentage of 40% for all the subsequent items.

Any suggestion on how to fit this requirement?

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders...
entry.content: Hi MTerence, Thank you

entry.title: Re: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders...
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: Adding External VLS Instructor
entry.content: Hi Cris, Did you found any solution to this?

entry.title: Re: Workday Integration with BTP Cloud integration (BTP CI / SAP CPI) through OAuth 2.0 Authenticati
entry.content:
Hi David,

Try with (replacing XXXX, YYYY and ZZZZ with proper values):

grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=XXXXX&client_id=YYYYYYYY&client_secret=ZZZZZZZ

You can check info here as well Refresh Tokens - OAuth 2.0 Simplified

BR

Raúl

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: Doubt/Confusion on Purchase Orders (in SAP GUI)
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

During tests, when creating a Purchase Order for a material containing a controlled/regulated substance - a drug percursor with "not compliant" marketability status (see image 1 below) - from an approved supplier, in the Product Compliance tab of the PO ( SAP GUI ) the field "Product Marketability Status" displays the message "OK - Not Relevant" (see image 2, below).

This is created a deal of confusion with the customer's users.

I'm asking for some clarification: is this because it's a purchase process and not a production and/or sales process?

Thank you in advance!

Image 1:

Image 2:

entry.title: Re: why items aggregation is not fetched with getBinding...
entry.content:
Hi,

Maybe binding may not be complete yet.

Can you look this topic? You can use these events same way in the "items" event.

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/29770332/perform-action-after-the-binding-is-complete

entry.title: Re: Business Role or Business Catalog to Application / Fi...
Re: Download/Upload of Content Network package to physical file (dot Package)
entry.content: Is it possible to open the downloaded .package file locally to read its content?

entry.title: Changes are not visible in the MyInbox fiori app after extending it using adapation project
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the below confuguration in my system: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 and SAP FIORI FES 2023 FOR S/4HANA.
I want to adapt/extend the UI of the standard Fiori app MyInbox (F0862)
1. After creating an adaptation project in BAS, I tried to extend the view using the existing UI extensions or hooks 

2. This created a fragment under the change folder but the changes are not reflected?

So can we extend the MyInbox app using Adaptation project in BAS? or we need to do some work around?

entry.title: Setting the scene for Planning Excellence 2024
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As we are planning our next physical on-site event for 2024; we are now setting the scene and looking into interesting topics to showcase - based on the feedback you gave us after last years event.

The current main theme looks to be: Embedded Artificial Intelligence in Planning.
A sub-topic will also to be Sustainability.

If these topics spark interest from you; feel free to like the post.
If you'd rather see something else or have other ideas you'd like to see integrated into the event; comment your thoughts below!

We are in the planning phase of Planning Excellence 2024, assist us in making the best use of your time!
Thank you

entry.title: Re: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementat...
entry.content: Thank you. I found that learning journey,  if Agile is part of the certificate shouldnt that learning journey be linked in the "How to prepair" part?" I had the idea, that when I go through the recommended learning journey all neccessary topics are covered, even if not in detail. So I understand: in edition to the recommended journey i have to check on other journeys, which might be related?

entry.title: VA01 Userexit before Entering Material details
entry.content:
Hi,

Need help for userexit in VA01 T-code

Steps

1. I need to trigger a Message for a field plant to be entered before going to enter the Material details

2. User need not to press 'enter' button.

Kindly help me.

entry.title: Roadmap viewer - Business Driven Configuration Questionnaires for Asset Management
entry.content:
Dear @SAPSupport,

I was reviewing the business driven configuration questionnaire (BDCQ) for asset management for SAP S/4H Public Cloud (3-system landscape). 
When reviewing this BDCQ, I noticed that all the scope items on the questionnaire are the old scope items, which are depcrecated for S/4Hana Public Cloud (as of 2302). When will a new and more complete questionnaire be made available on the roadmap viewer? 

These questionnaires should be an aid to consultants in the prepare and explore phase, but unfortunately it is unusable at this stage. 
thank you in advance for your assistance,
kind regards

entry.title: Re: SIGNAVIO Governance: Start a workflow from dictionary...
entry.content: Tks Cäcilia... Do you think these feature could be added on nexts products releases?

entry.title: Re: reuse HU in SHPCON (WHSCON) IDoc
entry.content:
Hello,

We face exactly the same issue to post GI with SHPCON idocs against HU shipped from an external WMS.
It seems that many SAP customers have problems with some specific checks that does not apply for transactional posting or GI replicated from EWM.
So I think there could a solution  that could be implemented but SAP do not consider this issue **bleep** major.

Laxmikatta,
Have you succeed to find a solution or a workaround ?
If so, could you please share it ?

Best Regards
CF

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024: MaXimize Transformation Success
entry.content:
How can SAP MaxAttention customers be supported on their individual business transformation journeys? This question set the tone for the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024, which took place April 23-25 at the brand-new Heidelberg Congress Center in Germany. With 250 customer attendees and several SAP executives and experts on-site, this year’s summit was the largest ever, bringing a unique diversity of expertise and experience under one roof. Throughout the event, speakers and participants explored the key enablers for transformation success through a variety of formats. These included keynotes, executive sessions, customer experience sharing, a lively customer panel, and engaging eXpert eXchange sessions. The summit further provided many opportunities for peer-to-peer networking among C-level attendees and one-on-one meetings between customers and SAP executives.

It’s All About Accelerating Innovation Adoption

The SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024 kicked off on Tuesday evening with a welcome reception and warm opening words from the event hosts Thomas Saueressig (member of the SAP Executive board and head of the newly established board area ‘Customer Services & Delivery’) and Kurt Bauer (SVP and Global Head of Premium Engagements). The following morning, Kurt Bauer officially opened the first day of content with a thought-provoking question: “How does your roadmap towards an intelligent enterprise look like?” With this, he pointed out that every transformation journey has its own characteristics, and that the role of SAP MaxAttention therefore is to provide individual, strategic guidance for every customer. Thomas Saueressig picked up on this point in his subsequent keynote and shed light on SAP's approach to cloud solution delivery. The key to customer success, he said, is to help them accelerate the adoption of SAP innovations so they can fully leverage the value of SAP’s portfolio.

One of these innovations – and probably the most talked about during the event – is SAP Business AI. To showcase how customers can maximize the value of multiple capabilities, Philipp Herzig (Chief AI Officer at SAP) shared insights into SAP’s AI strategy and presented demos of current generative AI use cases. By investing in these use cases, customers can expect to not only reduce their workload, but also save a huge amount of money – a statement that was echoed by John Hill (CIO of Suncor Energy) who joined Philipp on stage to share insights into the value he is seeing from this innovation, especially in relation to invoice and account management.

But SAP Business AI isn’t the only enabler of a successful transformation journey. As it was shown in the following executive sessions that day, SAP cloud ERP solutions and a clear view of enterprise architecture and business optimization build the foundation for a future-ready IT strategy. On the one hand, Jan Gilg (President Cloud ERP) gave the SAP MaxAttention community a taste of the benefits of moving to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and explained how an SAP-managed cloud environment enables enterprises of all sizes and industries to adopt innovation faster and more flexibly, without losing control of global operations.

On the other hand, Gero Decker (Co-Founder and General Manager of SAP Signavio) and André Christ (Co-Founder and General Manager of SAP LeanIX) demonstrated how the combination of SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX can help unlock value throughout RISE transformations. Specifically, the two products facilitate collaboration between business and IT on what a clean enterprise architecture and efficient business processes should look like, how to get there, and how to ensure that this new state is effectively implemented during rollout. As they summarized in the eXpert eXchange session that followed: SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX come into play when there is a need for change, and they will stop being used when companies no longer need to change – which will probably never happen.

The day closed with an outlook on the strategic direction of SAP MaxAttention by Kurt Bauer, leading into an open-mic Q&A session, during which Thomas Saueressig took the stage to answer the questions that affect customers the most.

Afterwards, all attendees were invited to a remarkable evening event at the Palazzo in Mannheim, where four members of the SAP Executive Board, Christian Klein (CEO), Thomas Saueressig, Muhammad Alam (SAP Product Engineering), and Gina Vargiu-Breuer (Chief People Officer), gave the SAP MaxAttention community a much-appreciated “maximum attention”.

How to Build a Strong Foundation for Your Business Transformation Journey

The final day of the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2024 started with a keynote from Muhammad Alam on SAP’s end-to-end portfolio strategy. He particularly emphasized the importance of clean and harmonized data for innovation adoption, which in turn paves the way for a successful business transformation. Muhammad was then joined on stage by two customer speakers, Ralf Scherer (Head of SAP Transformation, BMW Group) and Sean Williams (CIO, IBM Corporation), who shared insights from their RISE with SAP journeys. Both agreed on two points: a) speed of transformation is key and b) there is no better safeguarding for cloud migration than SAP MaxAttention.

In the following executive session, Anja Schneider (SVP & Global Head of Premium Engagement & Advisory) and Michael Ameling (EVP & Chief Product Officer SAP Business Technology Platform) demonstrated how premium engagements from SAP and SAP Business Technology Platform support customers’ business AI, data, and clean core strategy. Specifically, Anja promised that dedicated enterprise architects will continue to guide customers through their transformation journeys with a North Star Architecture roadmap, which will also facilitate the achievement of a clean core and therefore an increased business efficiency.

The summit ended with a closing keynote by Rolf Schumann (Co-CEO, Schwarz Digits) and Jonas Andrulis (Founder and CEO, Aleph Alpha GmbH) on the importance of cybersecurity and the new era of generative AI, as well as an event wrap-up by Thomas Saueressig, Kurt Bauer, and Anja Schneider. Kurt gave a preview of the next SAP MaxAttention events in 2024 and thanked all customers who shared their expertise as co-speakers for their great input in keynotes, during customer experience sharing sessions, or in the customer panel that was moderated by Peter Maier (SVP Strategic Customer Engagements).

Many attendees have already let us know how valuable this event was to them, and how much they appreciated the choice of content as well as the opportunity for personal conversations with SAP executives and peers from the SAP MaxAttention community. A particular highlight in this regard were the eXpert eXchange sessions on topics such as SAP Business AI, clean core, enterprise architecture, and RISE with SAP, where an intimate setting in small groups provided a great environment to go deeper into the content and discuss individual requests.

We’re looking forward to continuing the collaboration with our customers along their individual transformation journeys and hope to have more opportunities to meet at SAP Sapphire Orlando or Barcelona and the Regional SAP MaxAttention Expert Forums where we will dive deeper into the hot topics presented at the summit.

We’re delighted to share session recordings and presented slide decks with you to relive the event.

In case of any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out.

entry.title: Re: Action could not be successfully executed- Truck outbound freight order skipped
entry.content: We're facing same error while trying to send the TOR_REQ action from TM to LBN. How did you solve the error?

entry.title: Re: Cannot read properties of undefined | SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: You need to add logic (if) and check if item.id exists. If it does not exist, set the cell to 'Whatever'; if it exists, set it to the item.id.

entry.title: SAP CAP Java hybrid development in BAS
entry.content:
Hello CAP experts,

I try to use the destination service in my Business Application Studio.

So we need to connect to a destination to retrieve some data. With nodeJS this was quite easy.

For JAVA (+ cloud skd v5)  we tried the same but it's somehow not working.

So we used the CF tools extension to bind the destination service locally. This creates a .env file in the root of the project.

But after starting the app with mvn cds:watch and triggering the action it throws an exception:

Caused by: com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.exception.DestinationAccessException: Could not resolve destination to Destination Service on behalf of TECHNICAL_USER_CURRENT_TENANT.
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.lambda$prepareServiceDestinationComputation$1(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:117) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap.computeIfAbsent(ConcurrentHashMap.java:1708) ~[na:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.lambda$prepareServiceDestinationComputation$2(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:109) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.getConfigurationAsJsonInternal(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:226) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.getConfigurationAsJson(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:211) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationService.retrieveDestination(DestinationService.java:155) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationService.lambda$loadAndParseDestination$0(DestinationService.java:138) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.resilience4j.Resilience4jDecorationStrategy.lambda$decorateCallable$2(Resilience4jDecorationStrategy.java:179) ~[resilience4j-5.8.0.jar:na]
at io.github.resilience4j.bulkhead.Bulkhead.lambda$decorateCallable$5(Bulkhead.java:173) ~[resilience4j-bulkhead-2.2.0.jar:2.2.0]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.thread.ThreadContextExecutor.call(ThreadContextExecutor.java:297) ~[cloudplatform-core-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.thread.ThreadContextExecutor.execute(ThreadContextExecutor.java:240) ~[cloudplatform-core-5.8.0.jar:na]
... 8 common frames omitted
Caused by: com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.exception.NoServiceBindingException: Please make sure you have the Destination Service bound to your application.
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.getDestinationServiceBinding(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:249) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
at com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationServiceAdapter.lambda$prepareServiceDestinationComputation$1(DestinationServiceAdapter.java:111) ~[connectivity-destination-service-5.8.0.jar:na]
... 18 common frames omitted

Even the creation of a default-env.json in root is not working as the app now wants authentication (reporting directly 401 before loading the UI).

But as we configured 

cds:
  security:
    mock.users:
     ...

we assumed that this overrides this config.

After deployment to CF it works without any problem and retrieves the destination.

How do we setup this locally ?

entry.title: Exchange rate update for existing transactions for foreign vendors and customers in sap b1
entry.content:
I have a client that went to close the production order without receipt for production and at the end the remaining went to wastages. How can we reverse the production order for the wastages to be reversed in SAP.

Hope to get your response.

entry.title: DevOps with SAP BTP
entry.content:
As my initial blog post series around DevOps with SAP BTP is already some years old, I thought it would be about time to come up with a new article - to reflect latest changes about how you can enable your teams to benefit from it for developing and running their apps on the platform.

DevOps is a key enabler for achieving high-level agility and quality in development projects – also in SAP enterprise environments. If you should be new to DevOps, the DevOps | SAP Community topic page does offer a lot of information.

Although DevOps is mainly a cultural approach, tools can help to foster agile development principles along the lifecycle of applications. In this article, I will sketch the setup recommended by SAP for agile development projects on SAP BTP, using corresponding SAP BTP cloud services and offerings. The platform does offer several different development approaches and runtime environments, so details of this setup might slightly differ per use case, but the goal is to offer a similar concept fitting for the most important ones.

The following figure outlines the recommended approach on the example of SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment:

Recommended approach to apply DevOps on SAP BTP

 

As most of the depicted SAP BTP cloud services are also part of SAP Build Code, this does also reflect the recommended approach around this offering.

Let's go through those four phases in the remainder of this article.

1. Set Up Continuous Integration

One driver of the agility and built-in quality that DevOps brings is the automation of large parts of the deployment pipeline. For this, a Continuous Integration / Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipeline is involved that automatically gets executed whenever your development teams do submit changes to their source code management system, to qualify them. The pipeline automatically performs certain actions along different stages, such as to build your changes and to test them on different levels. With this, it provides feedback to the developer on the quality of his/her changes:

Using Continuous Integration and Delivery to automate large parts of the deployment process

So, the first challenge is to set up CI/CD for your SAP BTP development use cases. Here, SAP BTP does offer a two-fold approach:

  • Option 1: Pipeline as a Service with SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
    • Opinionated, highly integrated setup that allows to benefit from agile methods without having to bring expertise
    • Brings pipeline templates for typical SAP BTP development use cases, such as to develop a side-by-side extension using Cloud Application Programming model (CAP) or a compelling UI using SAP Fiori on Neo/Cloud Foundry/ABAP Front-End Servers; with this, it allows to come up with a running build, test and deploy pipeline for those SAP BTP specific use cases in minutes – where the pipeline can be configured completely via UI (configuration as code is optionally also possible)
    • No need to build up and especially operate an own CI/CD infrastructure – only prerequisite: bring your own Git as source code management system
    • SAP product, with direct support from SAP
    • With this, addressing also those partners and customers that do not bring experience or that are looking for a CI/CD setup recommended and provided by SAP, reducing the overhead and cognitive load of their developers

Easy process to set up pipeline in SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery service

  • Option 2: Toolbox with open source offering project ‘Piper’
    • Building blocks that allow you to build an own pipeline for SAP-specific use cases easier: pipeline templates (for Jenkins only), a library of pipeline steps (in Golang, which allows you to use them also for non-Jenkins CI/CD infrastructures), scenarios (end-to-end descriptions with sample code snippets), and Docker images you can easily add to your pipeline (example for usage with Azure DevOps)
    • As it is an open source offering, there is no direct support provided by SAP – only community support, you have to create and then own your pipeline
    • With this, the offering is addressing those partners and customers that need full flexibility and already bring expertise or infrastructure (or are willing to build it up and operate it) and now want to know how to best expand it also for SAP-specific use cases

2. Develop

This CI pipeline is then used by your development teams to qualify their changes – here, changes get pushed to a central source code repository based on Git, which then can automatically triggers a run of the corresponding pipeline via webhook. This pipeline run performs a build and executes automated test cases. The developer then gets informed about issues with the performed changes and can react on those directly. Also, compliance checks, such as for security flaws with used third-party libraries, can be tested as part of the pipeline run.

Example of agile development process

Of course, there are many frameworks available for automated testing – SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery service does provide an opinionated proposal for corresponding frameworks, which then have to be set up accordingly. If you want to use alternative frameworks, SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery allows to extend the predefined pipelines with scripting (for more information, see this blog post).

For the creation of the actual test cases, a step-wise approach is recommended, where you start with first test cases and then evolve by time, by adding additional cases, also based on the issues that come up later and on the latest compliance requirements you might face.

As implied above, the actual development process will slightly differ per development environment. For example, on Cloud Foundry, you might use SAP Business Application Studio (where you would benefit from a direct integration of SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery, allowing to set up and monitor corresponding pipelines directly from the IDE), on Neo SAP Web IDE Full-Stack and on SAP BTP ABAP development tools in Eclipse. Still, the general approach for these environments could be similar, as depicted above.

3. Deliver

When your teams come up with a qualified release candidate, they can either perform a direct deployment out of the pipeline (when all tests are “green”, a direct deployment can be triggered) – or you benefit from a standardized central transport and change management approach, using SAP Cloud Transport Management. The later is our recommended approach for most enterprise environments, where you normally want to have additional control of your production subaccounts.

The actual transport concept is quite similar to what you might be used to from development in on-premise and private cloud environments, with a centrally defined delivery landscape:

  • With the option to control who is allowed to handle changes where (that is, on which SAP BTP subaccount),
  • With a central log file for auditing,
  • With the option to synchronize the propagation of changes from different environments (such as from private cloud/on-premise together with related cloud changes), where change and deployment management capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM or Change Request Management (ChaRM) of SAP Solution Manager could orchestrate SAP Cloud Transport Management service, in addition to orchestrating then also private cloud/on-premise transport mechanisms.

Still, here with the option to combine it on SAP BTP with CI principles, so that your development teams can benefit from tight feedback loops enabled by an automated pipeline, to verify single developer changes - while you still have full control for the propagation of those changes towards your production environment, with the automated hand-over from the pipeline into a controlled, centrally managed and pre-defined delivery landscape. Then to verify the release candidate, potentially consisting of changes from different environments and typically done with a manual confirmation.

Hybrid change management

SAP Cloud Transport Management service can cover more and more content types, such as:

  • SAP Fiori content (in Neo and Cloud Foundry)
  • CAP applications (in the form of MTA archives),
  • Objects from SAP BTP ABAP environment,
  • Content from SAP Build (SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Build Work Zone, …),
  • App-specific content types, such as iFlows from SAP Integration Suite and Network Package content from SAP Analytics Cloud
  • See the full list here

With this, you can establish a standardized transport management process for more and more development use cases around SAP BTP - with the option to integrate all those content types into your central change and delivery management process, such as provided by SAP Cloud ALM.

SAP Cloud Transport Management service is out-of-the-box integrated with SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery - just switch on the corresponding option of the Release stage:

Screenshot from 'Release' stage of SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery

It can also be integrated into other CI stacks via a step of the library from project Piper into third-party pipelines or open APIs (for example, see this blog post on using Azure DevOps with transports).

 

4. Operate

With SAP Cloud ALM, SAP is providing a central observability platform for all SAP products, including SAP BTP (in interplay with several local SAP-BTP-specific observability capabilities). To operate your apps on SAP BTP, you can therefore use its unified monitoring, alerting and analytics offering based on telemetry data exposed by SAP BTP (and other SAP solutions), to reduce the meantime to detect any issues. SAP is using OpenTelemetry as unified and open instrumentation approach for SAP BTP use cases, allowing you for example to instrument your custom apps for central observability.

Functional overview of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations

For more information, see SAP Cloud ALM for Operations.

To resolve issues, you can then navigate from SAP Cloud ALM to the local expert tools on SAP BTP, to perform a use-case-specific root cause analysis. For example, from an error message in Exception Monitoring of SAP Cloud ALM, you could directly jump to SAP Cloud Logging service to perform a detailed analysis, for which the service stores and visualizes log files, metrics, and traces from your apps running in different SAP BTP environments.

For the execution of corrective actions on SAP BTP, events in SAP Cloud ALM could automatically trigger the execution of corresponding commands on SAP Automation Pilot. This service offers a low-code and no-code automation engine and brings catalogs of automated actions that you can use to compile the best-fitting command for automating your recurring DevOps-related tasks and for remediation of alerts from your individual SAP BTP applications.

Automate recurring ops tasks with SAP Automation Pilot

This way, you can optimize your operation efforts and increase the resilience of your business scenarios.

 

Summary

SAP BTP offers a low-entry approach to verify the value a more agile development process can bring - also for your SAP applications. It does comprise highly-integrated DevOps services along the complete lifecycle - from CI/CD to development, delivery and operations, with a smooth integration option into SAP Cloud ALM, as SAP's strategic operations and central observability platform. SAP Cloud ALM allows the central operation of your holistic business scenarios spanning several environments. If you should have special needs or third-party frameworks already in use around DevOps, benefit from open APIs of the DevOps services of SAP BTP and of SAP Cloud ALM.

If you want to learn more, check out the information from the DevOps | SAP Community topic page and consider to take the learning journey Discovering DevOps with SAP BTP. If you want to try it out, all DevOps services are part of SAP BTP free tier, so the above setup can be experienced without charge. Otherwise, SAP Build Code is a good starting point as well, as it does comprise most of the DevOps-related SAP BTP services.

entry.title: Re: Send SAPscript form PDF from output type message to Business Network
entry.content:
Two issues encountered requiring changes to solution. 

1.  NAST record did not exist.  Moved logic to userexit ZXM06U02.  Dobject is a global field that contains the necessary NAST record information.  Warning:  this userexit is called multiple times.  We placed code after segment E1ARBCIG_HDR is located.

2. We encountered sporadic issues with pdf's being corrupt, could not open them.  This issue is due to invalid logic on splitting the data up in sections of 255 characters.  Actual issue is in regards to use of the ceil.  

div = ceil( len / 255 ).

This above line doesn't give expected value.  It was not handling the remainder.  To correct this we created an interim variable defined as decfloat.  

      divwrem        TYPE decfloat16,

Then inserted the following line and adjusted the ceil statement to use divwrem.

        divwrem = len / 255.
        div  = ceil( divwrem ).

My example was len = 28116.  When processed through original logic as posted above, div = 110.  Looping 110 times left off the last 66 (110 x 255 = 28050, 28116 - 28050 = 66).  PDF couldn't be opened as it was missing required info at the end including startxref.  Change to calculation div = 111 and then remainder processed with creating the last segment and then pdf could be opened in scc.

entry.title: Re: What to start from to gain knowledge in FPSL?
entry.content:
Hello, 

this topic is not in the SAP portfolio any longer as it belongs to SAP Fioneer. Any and all training is available through SAP Fioneer. The product page is here:

https://www.sapfioneer.com/finance-esg/financial-products-subledger-fpsl/

regards, 

Stefanos

entry.title: DYNPRO deletes value after user interaction
entry.content:
Hi,

im neu in ABAP Welt and tried to write a calculator but whenever i click a button. it deletes field which i want to also see. Can You experts help me for this?

here is my code:

MODULE user_command_2000 INPUT.
   IF sy-ucomm EQ 'BACK'.
     LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.
   ELSEIF sy-ucomm EQ 'CLEAR'.
     CLEAR:
           gv_numinp1 ,
           gv_numinp2 ,
           gv_numoutp1.
   ELSEIF sy-ucomm EQ 'EXIT' OR sy-ucomm EQ 'CANC'.
     LEAVE PROGRAM.
   ELSEIF sy-ucomm EQ 'CALC'.
     IF gv_numinp1 IS INITIAL AND gv_numinp2 IS INITIAL.
       MESSAGE 'bitte' TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
     ENDIF.
     CREATE OBJECT go_main EXPORTING iv_num1 = gv_numinp1 iv_num2 = gv_numinp2.
     IF gv_radplus EQ abap_true. "Summe
       go_main->sum(

         IMPORTING
           ev_result =            gv_numoutp1  " RESULT
       ).

     ELSEIF gv_radmin EQ abap_true. "Minus
       go_main->subtraction(
       IMPORTING
           ev_result =            gv_numoutp1  " RESULT
       ).

     ELSEIF gv_radmultip EQ abap_true. "multiplication
       go_main->multiplication(
       IMPORTING
           ev_result =            gv_numoutp1  " RESULT
       ).

     ELSEIF gv_raddiv EQ abap_true. "division
       go_main->division(
       IMPORTING
           ev_result =            gv_numoutp1  " RESULT
       ).
     ENDIF.

   ENDIF.
   WRITE gv_numoutp1.
 ENDMODULE.

 

and Photos:

before:

and after click:

BR.

entry.title: Re: Subcontract process for special stock
entry.content:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/36802406aebb4b96b1598246e1d316ee/96dbc353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: Re: Failed SHPCON idoc (51 status) changes the packed qty in the SD delivery document
entry.content:
Hello 
@SAPSupport please advise

entry.title: Where I learn how AI technologies can be leveraged to address key challenges in finance?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Discovering New AI Capabilities for SAP Finance S/4HANA​ learning journey.

Overview
Delve into the cutting-edge intersection of finance and artificial intelligence (AI) with SAP’s innovative solutions. Gain a deep understanding of how SAP's AI strategy revolutionizes financial management, empowering organizations to make data-driven decisions and optimize business processes.

Learning objectives

  • Understand SAP's AI strategy and its implications for financial operations.
  • Explore the range of AI offerings within SAP that cater to finance functions.
  • Learn how AI technologies can be leveraged to address key challenges in finance.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites (community, etc.) if it's not a question about SAP Web sites! You can use Technology Q&A or any groups. See here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-ask-a-question-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684801

entry.title: Re: creation of multiple sales return orders by the refer...
entry.content:
And, have you tried this is SAP? 

I believe standard system does issue a warning message (Message Number V1499) when second Return Order is created with reference to same Invoice. The Message also indicates the Quantity used in Returns Order: 

Thanks,

entry.title: Deleted PO in S012 - MCE3
entry.content:
i created a po and after that i deleted it

after running MCE3 still i see result of PO in MCE3 and also S012

how can i ignore or remove deleted PO result from MCE3 ( or S012 )

entry.title: Re: ModuleError: failed to load 'unit/unitTests.qunit.js'
entry.content:
You need to specify the namespace for the unit tests as well. please try to use 

data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{"student10.com.sap.training.ux402.qunit/ux402_qunit": "../../",
"unit": "."}' in your unitTests.qunit.html file

entry.title: Re: TM S4/HANA 2022 version Transportation Cockipt Dump i...
entry.content: Pl maintain CONTEXT = 0, for all the planning t code /SCMTMS/PLN - Roles in PFCG

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarifica...
entry.content: Thank you Shpresim. But could you also see if my understanding of concept subscription billing is right?

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Herkese merhaba

Giriş kontrol üyesi seçiminde yazı tipi boyutunu değiştirmem gerekiyor.

Bu durum için CSS'ye çalışıyorum. Başlık Başlığı ve Altyazı için çalışır ancak seçimde çalışmaz. Bunun için bir çözüm var mı?

entry.title: SAP BW Query Designer - Issue with Variable Filtering
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering an issue in SAP BW Query Designer regarding variable filtering. When I display table and use the 'variables' option to filter data for a specific value, I only get one row of results. However, when I try to search for my value without filtering by simply scrolling through the table, I can see that there are many different results for that one value that are not displayed when filtering. Is there a solution to ensure that all results are shown when filtering?

Thank you for your help!

  •

entry.title: Re: What to start from to gain knowledge in FPSL?
entry.content:
Hi. 

The FPSL training was handed over to SAP Fioneer. Please contact the partner for available training: SAP Fioneer | World-class software solutions for financial services. 
 
Thanks,
Greg
SAP Product Learning Portfolio Manager for Industries
